docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF, BOFENG LU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, KUNSHAN YIN IS PRESENT.
